activity.title: Recent Activity
activity.subtitle: Updates and alerts across your projects

studioLanding.heroTitle: The Ultimate Real-Time Manga Collaboration Platform
studioLanding.heroDescription: A role-based ecosystem connecting Mangaka, Assistants, Editors, Publishers, and Readers in one seamless creative workspace built for the next generation of manga production.
studioLanding.coreFeaturesTitle: Everything you need to ship a chapter
studioLanding.featureCanvasDesc: Collaborative drawing tools with pixel-perfect comments, layer locking, and live cursors across every team member.
studioLanding.featureWorkflowDesc: Kanban-based chapter states automate handoffs from thumbnail to publish — no more lost files or version chaos.
studioLanding.featureRolesDesc: Permission-driven access per role keeps creators, editors, and publishers focused on exactly what they own.

roleCta.creatorsTitle: Creators — Bring your manga to life
roleCta.creatorsDesc: Tools, assistants and editorial feedback in one workspace built for serialized storytelling.
roleCta.assistantsTitle: Assistants — Get paid for your craft
roleCta.assistantsDesc: Pick up gigs from established mangaka with transparent rates, milestones and instant payouts.
roleCta.readersTitle: Readers — Discover and vote for your favorites
roleCta.readersDesc: Explore upcoming series, support creators directly and help shape which stories get serialized next.

serverOverlay.connectingDesc: The backend server is spinning up on Render. This usually takes 1-2 minutes as services wake up from sleep. Thank you for your patience!

studio.title: Studio Workspace
studio.uploadHint: Upload manga pages to get started. Use the upload button in the toolbar.
studio.waitHint: Waiting for mangaka to upload pages.
studio.noZones: No zones yet. Select the Zone tool and draw on the canvas.
studio.drawOnCanvas: Draw a rectangle on the canvas to create a zone
studio.noTaskForZone: No task created for this zone yet.
studio.reviewNotesPlaceholder: Enter review comments or revision instructions...
studio.designateBanner: You are designating a new Assistant for an already posted task. Adjustments below will update this task.
studio.noRecommendedAssistants: No assistants found with this skill. You can post publicly.
studio.confirmDeletePage: Are you sure you want to delete this page? All zones and tasks on this page will be lost.
studio.reviewLockedTantou: Series is pending Tantou Editor review — Studio editing temporarily locked
studio.reviewLockedEB: Series is pending Editorial Board review — Studio editing temporarily locked
studio.reviewLockedDescription: You are in view-only mode. Cannot upload pages, draw zones, assign tasks, or edit until the review is complete or draft is returned.
studio.deleteLayerConfirm: Remove this layer from the composition?
studio.deleteLayerWarningStandalone: Are you sure you want to permanently delete this standalone layer? This action cannot be undone.
studio.deleteLayerWarningTask: Remove this assistant layer from the page composition? The underlying task and assistant submission will NOT be deleted.
studio.publishedLockedTitle: Chapter has been published — Studio editing locked
studio.publishedLockedDescription: You are in view-only mode. Cannot upload pages, draw zones, assign tasks, or edit layers for published chapters.
studio.publishedEditorInfoTitle: Chapter has been published — Editor access active
studio.publishedEditorInfoDescription: Editing is unlocked for editors. You can edit the canvas, manage tasks, or unpublish the chapter to return it to Draft status.
studio.unpublishConfirm: Are you sure you want to unpublish this chapter? This will set it back to Draft status.
studio.unpublishSuccess: Chapter unpublished successfully! It is now in Draft mode.
studio.submitReviewDescription: Select the assistant layers and standalone layers to submit for each page. The system will automatically composite the selected layers onto the base page for review.
studio.noLayersPlaceholder: No assistant or standalone layers (original base page will be submitted).
studio.rejectedWarning: Manuscript rejected — Please revise based on the corrections below
studio.reviewWarning: This feedback pin will only be visible to the Mangaka after you REJECT the manuscript from the Editor Portal. If you Approve, this pin will remain hidden.

assistant.title: Assistant Portal
assistant.subtitle: Find tasks, track progress, and manage your earnings
assistant.earningsSubtitle: Your earnings over the last 6 months
assistant.noTasksHint: Try adjusting your filters or check back later.
assistant.confirmDecline: Are you sure you want to decline this assigned task?

discover.title: Discover
discover.subtitle: Explore manga, vote for favorites, and join the community

editor.title: Editor Portal
editor.subtitle: Review drafts, annotate pages, and track studio progress
editor.noPendingHint: All drafts have been reviewed. Check back later.
editor.ebSubtitle: Manage submissions, publish series, and overview ecosystem status.
editor.tantouSubtitle: Review manuscript drafts, place coordinate annotations, and track studio completion.
editor.approvalsInboxHint: No manga series drafts are currently awaiting review in your pipeline.
editor.noChaptersUploaded: No chapters uploaded for this series draft yet.
editor.selectMonitoredSub: Overview real-time chapter metrics and place corrections.
editor.noChapters: No chapters created for this series yet.
editor.writeRejectionDesc: Explain what edits, cover updates, or manuscript revisions are required before this series is approved.
editor.rejectionPlaceholder: Write corrections details (e.g. Title is clashing, genres mismatch, cover resolution too low...)
editor.assignedInboxHint: You are currently not designated as a Tantou Editor for any production series.
editor.noRejectionHistory: No rejection records for this mangaka.

editorialBoard.subtitle: Vote on series, manage publications, and track rankings
editorialBoard.noPendingHint: All submitted series have been voted on.
editorialBoard.lowVotedAlertHint: Series with low weekly reader votes that may need to be discontinued
editorialBoard.noAtRiskHint: No active series are currently at cancellation risk.
editorialBoard.confirmCancelMeeting: Are you sure you want to cancel this meeting?

notifications.categorySubtitle: There are no notifications under this category.

settingsPage.subscribeNewSeriesDesc: Receive a system notification when a brand new series is published on MangaFlow.
